channel.title: Risk-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Risk-Management on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: From Bets to Hard Utility: Why Prediction Markets are the Next Frontier of Insurance
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the convergence of prediction markets and parametric insurance as the next frontier for real-time risk management and synthetic reinsurance.

item.title: Cyber Resilience on the Board Agenda
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In this panel discussion, John Januszczak joins experts to reframe cyber resilience from a technical expense to a strategic enabler. John highlights how resilience serves as a proxy for management quality and is essential for ensuring revenue continuity in the digital age.
